button.name: action_cancel
button.invisible: not id or not (state == 'draft' or (state == 'in_process' and is_sent))

button.name: button_request_cancel
button.invisible: state != 'in_process' or not move_id or not need_cancel_request

button.name: unmark_as_sent
button.invisible: state != 'in_process' or not is_sent or payment_method_code != 'manual'

div.class: o_payment_header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between flex-wrap gap-3 mb-4 p-3 bg-light rounded-3 border

span.class: badge rounded-pill fs-3 px-4 py-2 bg-success shadow-sm
badge rounded-pill fs-3 px-4 py-2 bg-danger shadow-sm

div.class: d-flex align-items-center gap-2 px-2 py-1 rounded bg-info-subtle small
d-flex align-items-center gap-2 p-1 mt-2 rounded
d-flex align-items-center gap-2 p-1 rounded mb-1
d-flex align-items-center gap-2 p-1 rounded mb-1
d-flex align-items-center gap-2 p-1 rounded mb-1
p-2 bg-warning-subtle border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
p-2 bg-primary-subtle border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2
p-2 bg-secondary-subtle border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
p-2 bg-light border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2

button.name: action_apply_mass_account
button.title: Aplicar cuenta a todas las líneas sin documento

field.name: help
field.p: Crear un nuevo pago a proveedor
Registre pagos a sus proveedores y aplíquelos a facturas pendientes.

field.name: help
field.p: Crear un nuevo cobro de cliente
Registre cobros de sus clientes y aplíquelos a facturas pendientes.
